Title: Measure register: Sparkline Income
Definition: VAR LineColour = "%2300B050" VAR PointColour = "white" VAR Defs = "<defs> <linearGradient id='grad' x1='0' y1='25' x2='0' y2='50' gradientUnits='userSpaceOnUse'> <stop stop-color='#00B050' offset='0' /> <stop stop-color='#00B050' offset='0.3' /> <stop stop-color='white' offset='1' /> </linearGradient> </defs>" VAR CurrentYear = SELECTEDVALUE( dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] ) VAR PeriodSpine = FILTER( ALL( dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber], dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ), CALCULATE( MAX( dim_date[IsPeriodClosed] ), dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear ) = TRUE() ) VAR XMin = MINX( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR XMax = MAXX( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR YMinValue = MINX( PeriodSpine, CALCULATE( SUM( fact_gl_balances[ActualGBP] ), dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear, dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber] = dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber], dim_accounts[Level8Name] = "Income" )) VAR YMaxValue = MAXX( PeriodSpine, CALCULATE( SUM( fact_gl_balances[ActualGBP] ), dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear, dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber] = dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber], dim_accounts[Level8Name] = "Income" )) VAR YRange = YMaxValue - YMinValue VAR SafeYRange = IF( YRange = 0, 1, YRange ) VAR SparklineTable = ADDCOLUMNS( PeriodSpine, "X", INT( 150 * DIVIDE( dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] - XMin, XMax - XMin )), "Y", INT( 50 * DIVIDE( CALCULATE( SUM( fact_gl_balances[ActualGBP] ), dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear, dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber] = dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber], dim_accounts[Level8Name] = "Income" ) - YMinValue, SafeYRange ))) VAR Lines = CONCATENATEX( SparklineTable, [X] & "," & 50-[Y], " ", dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR LastSparkXValue = MAXX( FILTER( SparklineTable, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] = MAXX( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] )), [X] ) VAR LastSparkYValue = MAXX( FILTER( SparklineTable, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] = MAXX( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] )), [Y] ) VAR SVGImageURL = "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' x='0px' y='0px' viewBox='-7 -7 164 64'>" & Defs & "<polyline fill='url(#grad)' fill-opacity='0.3' stroke='transparent' stroke-width='0' points=' 0 50 " & Lines & " 150 150 Z '/>" & "<polyline fill='transparent' stroke='" & LineColour & "' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' stroke-width='3' points=' " & Lines & " '/>" & "<circle cx='" & LastSparkXValue & "' cy='" & 50-LastSparkYValue & "' r='4' stroke='" & LineColour & "' stroke-width='3' fill='" & PointColour & "' />" & "</svg>" RETURN SVGImageURL
Governance Status: Imported from current PBIP; review required
Technical Notes: Current model measure extracted from TMDL static inspection.

Title: Measure register: Sparkline Pay
Definition: VAR LineColour = "%2300B050" VAR PointColour = "white" VAR CurrentYear = SELECTEDVALUE ( dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] ) VAR PeriodSpine = FILTER ( ALL ( dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ), CALCULATE ( MAX ( dim_date[IsPeriodClosed] ), dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear ) = TRUE () ) VAR XMin = MINX ( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR XMax = MAXX ( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR SafeX = IF ( XMax = XMin, 1, XMax - XMin ) VAR YMin = MINX ( PeriodSpine, CALCULATE ( SUM ( fact_gl_balances[ActualGBP] ), dim_accounts[Level8Name] = "Pay" ) ) VAR YMax = MAXX ( PeriodSpine, CALCULATE ( SUM ( fact_gl_balances[ActualGBP] ), dim_accounts[Level8Name] = "Pay" ) ) VAR SafeY = IF ( YMax = YMin, 1, YMax - YMin ) VAR SparklineTable = ADDCOLUMNS ( PeriodSpine, "X", INT ( 150 * DIVIDE ( dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] - XMin, SafeX ) ), "Y", INT ( 50 * DIVIDE ( CALCULATE ( SUM ( fact_gl_balances[ActualGBP] ), dim_accounts[Level8Name] = "Pay" ) - YMin, SafeY ) ) ) VAR Lines = CONCATENATEX ( SparklineTable, [X] & "," & ( 50 - [Y] ), " ", dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR LastSort = MAXX ( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR LastX = MAXX ( FILTER ( SparklineTable, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] = LastSort ), [X] ) VAR LastY = MAXX ( FILTER ( SparklineTable, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] = LastSort ), [Y] ) VAR GradId = "gradPay" & CurrentYear RETURN IF ( ISBLANK ( CurrentYear ), BLANK (), "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='-7 -7 164 64'>" & "<defs> <linearGradient id='" & GradId & "' x1='0' y1='25' x2='0' y2='50'> <stop stop-color='#00B050' offset='0'/> <stop stop-color='#00B050' offset='0.3'/> <stop stop-color='white' offset='1'/> </linearGradient> </defs>" & "<polyline fill='url(#" & GradId & ")' fill-opacity='0.3' stroke='transparent' points='0 50 " & Lines & " 150 150 Z'/>" & "<polyline fill='transparent' stroke='" & LineColour & "' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' points='" & Lines & "'/>" & "<circle cx='" & LastX & "' cy='" & ( 50 - LastY ) & "' r='4' stroke='" & LineColour & "' stroke-width='3' fill='" & PointColour & "'/>" & "</svg>" )

Title: Measure register: Sparkline Non-Pay
Definition: VAR LineColour = "%23F0A830" // NHS amber for non-pay costs VAR PointColour = "white" VAR Defs = "<defs> <linearGradient id='grad' x1='0' y1='25' x2='0' y2='50' gradientUnits='userSpaceOnUse'> <stop stop-color='#F0A830' offset='0' /> <stop stop-color='#F0A830' offset='0.3' /> <stop stop-color='white' offset='1' /> </linearGradient> </defs>" VAR CurrentYear = SELECTEDVALUE( dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] ) VAR PeriodSpine = FILTER( ALL( dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber], dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ), CALCULATE( MAX( dim_date[IsPeriodClosed] ), dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear ) = TRUE() ) VAR XMin = MINX( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR XMax = MAXX( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR YMinValue = MINX( PeriodSpine, CALCULATE( SUM( fact_gl_balances[ActualGBP] ), dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear, dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber] = dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber], dim_accounts[Level8Name] = "Non-Pay" ) ) VAR YMaxValue = MAXX( PeriodSpine, CALCULATE( SUM( fact_gl_balances[ActualGBP] ), dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear, dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber] = dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber], dim_accounts[Level8Name] = "Non-Pay" ) ) VAR SparklineTable = ADDCOLUMNS( PeriodSpine, "X", INT( 150 * DIVIDE( dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] - YMinValue, YMaxValue - YMinValue )) ) VAR Lines = CONCATENATEX( SparklineTable, [X] & "," & 50 - [Y], " ", dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR LastSort = MAXX( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR LastX = MAXX( FILTER( SparklineTable, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] = LastSort ), [X] ) VAR LastY = MAXX( FILTER( SparklineTable, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] = LastSort ), [Y] ) RETURN "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' x='0px' y='0px' viewBox='-7 -7 164 64'>" & Defs & "<polyline fill='url(#grad)' fill-opacity='0.3' stroke='transparent' stroke-width='0' points=' 0 50 " & Lines & " 150 150 Z '/>" & "<polyline fill='transparent' stroke='" & LineColour & "' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' stroke-width='3' points=' " & Lines & " '/>" & "<circle cx='" & LastX & "' cy='" & 50 - Title: Measure register: Sparkline WTW
Definition: VAR LineColour = "%23118DFF" -- #118DFF (URL‑encoded) VAR PointColour = "white" -- Require exactly one fiscal year in context VAR CurrentYear = SELECTEDVALUE ( dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] ) -- Exit early if year not uniquely defined VAR HasYear = NOT ISBLANK ( CurrentYear ) -- Build a spine of closed periods in the selected year VAR PeriodSpine = FILTER ( ALL ( dim_date[FiscalMonthNumber], dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ), CALCULATE ( MAX ( dim_date[IsPeriodClosed] ), dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear ) = TRUE () ) -- X‑axis bounds VAR XMin = MINX ( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR XMax = MAXX ( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR SafeXRange = IF ( XMax = XMin, 1, XMax - XMin ) -- Y‑axis bounds VAR YMinValue = MINX ( PeriodSpine, CALCULATE ( [Actual WTW (GLX) Base], dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear ) ) VAR YMaxValue = MAXX ( PeriodSpine, CALCULATE ( [Actual WTW (GLX) Base], dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear ) ) VAR SafeYRange = IF ( YMaxValue = YMinValue, 1, YMaxValue - YMinValue ) -- Scale points into SVG coordinate space (150 x 50) VAR SparklineTable = ADDCOLUMNS ( PeriodSpine, "X", INT ( 150 * DIVIDE ( dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] - XMin, SafeXRange ) ), "Y", INT ( 50 * DIVIDE ( CALCULATE ( [Actual WTW (GLX) Base], dim_date[FiscalYearNumber] = CurrentYear ) - YMinValue, SafeYRange ) ) ) -- Polyline points VAR Lines = CONCATENATEX ( SparklineTable, [X] & "," & ( 50 - [Y] ), " ", dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) -- Last point highlight VAR LastSort = MAXX ( PeriodSpine, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] ) VAR LastX = MAXX ( FILTER ( SparklineTable, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] = LastSort ), [X] ) VAR LastY = MAXX ( FILTER ( SparklineTable, dim_date[FiscalPeriodSort] = LastSort ), [Y] ) -- Unique gradient per year (avoids ID collisions) VAR GradId = "grad" & CurrentYear VAR Defs = "<defs> <linearGradient id='" & GradId & "' x1='0' y1='25' x2='0' y2='50' gradientUnits='userSpaceOnUse'> <stop stop-color='#118DFF' offset='0' /> <stop stop-color='#118DFF' offset='0.3' /> <stop stop-color='white' offset='1' /> </linearGradient> </defs>" RETURN IF ( NOT HasYear, BLANK (), "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='-7 -7 164 64'>" & Defs & "<polyline fill='url(#" & GradId & ")' fill-opacity='0.3' stroke='transparent' stroke-width='0' points='0 50 " & Lines & " 150 150 Z' />" & "<polyline fill='transparent' stroke='" & LineColour & "' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' stroke-width='3' points='" & Lines & "' />" & "<circle cx='" & LastX & "' cy='" & ( 50 - LastY ) & "' r='4' stroke='" & LineColour & "' stroke-width='3' fill='" & PointColour & "' />" & "</svg>" )
